summary:
The hidden problem (the "needle in the haystack") was missing input validation in the inventory adjustment endpoint. Specifically, the POST `/inventory/:sku/adjust` route did not prevent adjustments that would result in negative inventory quantities.

I add input validation to check if an adjustment would make the quantity go below zero. If so, the API now rejects it with a 400 error.

This prevents the inventory from going negative, as confirmed by the test.
